channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MCLOUD] Magellanic Cloud Ltd: Promoter Disclosure Revised for FY26
item.description:
Magellanic Cloud Ltd has filed a revised disclosure for the year ended March 31, 2026, under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The revision addresses a typographical error in a previous filing. The promoter and promoter group confirm that all encumbrances created by way of pledge over equity shares have been duly disclosed. As of March 31, 2026, a total of 10,78,55,554 equity shares held by the promoter and promoter group are pledged. The filing also details the shareholding of key promoters and promoter group members as of the same date.

  • Revised promoter disclosure filed for FY26 due to a clerical error.
  • Total of 10,78,55,554 equity shares are pledged by promoters.
  • All encumbrances were previously disclosed as per SEBI regulations.
  • Shareholding details for key promoters and promoter group provided.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Magellanic Cloud Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [SNOWMAN] Snowman Logistics Appoints Two Independent Directors, Two Depart
item.description:
Snowman Logistics Limited's Board of Directors has approved the appointment of Mr. Raghav Chandra and Ms. Sriparna Ganguly Chaudhuri as Non-Executive Independent Directors for a term of five years, subject to shareholder approval. Concurrently, Mr. Arun Kumar Gupta and Mr. Bhaskar Avula Reddy will cease to be Independent Directors upon completion of their second consecutive five-year terms on April 26, 2026. The company also announced the resignation of Mr. Sohan Singh Dhakad as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective April 30, 2026, and appointed Ms. Richa Gupta to the role starting May 1, 2026. The board also updated the authorized Key Managerial Personnel for determining event materiality.

  • Two new Non-Executive Independent Directors appointed for a 5-year term.
  • Two existing Independent Directors to complete their terms and cease.
  • Company Secretary and Compliance Officer resigns; new appointment made.
  • Updated list of authorized Key Managerial Personnel for disclosures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Snowman Logistics Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [MCLOUD] Magellanic Cloud Ltd: Promoter Disclosure Revised for FY26
item.description:
Magellanic Cloud Ltd has filed a revised disclosure under SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The revision addresses a typographical error in a previous filing concerning promoter shareholding and encumbrances. As of March 31, 2026, the promoter and promoter group collectively hold 107,855,554 equity shares, which are pledged. The company confirms that all encumbrances created during the financial year ended March 31, 2026, have been duly disclosed.

  • Revised promoter disclosure filed for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Disclosure pertains to SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations.
  • Typographical error in previous filing has been corrected.
  • 107,855,554 promoter shares are pledged as of March 31, 2026.
  • No additional encumbrances created beyond previously disclosed ones.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Magellanic Cloud Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [MUTHOOTMF] Muthoot Microfin: FY26 AUM Grows 13% to ₹14,006 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Muthoot Microfin reported a strong business update for FY26, with Assets Under Management (AUM) growing 13% YoY to ₹14,006 crore. The company saw healthy AUM growth surpassing guidance, supported by increased disbursements and successful diversification into new product lines like Individual Loans, Micro-Lap, and Gold Loans. Asset quality improved with lower GNPA and higher collection efficiencies. Credit costs moderated, leading to sustained profitability. Funding conditions were conducive with a declining cost of funds. The company also saw positive credit and ESG rating upgrades and significant app downloads.

  • AUM grew 13% YoY to ₹14,006 crore in FY26.
  • Portfolio diversification improved, with non-JLG products at 17%.
  • GNPA reduced to 3.89% and Credit Cost to 3.5% in FY26.
  • Borrowing cost declined to 10.27% in Q4 FY26.
  • ESG rating upgraded to 80.8 (CareEdge-ESG 1+).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Muthoot Microfin Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [GOPAL] Gopal Snacks Board Meeting on May 12 to Consider FY26 Results & Dividend
item.description:
Gopal Snacks Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 12, 2026. The meeting will focus on approving the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, including the Statement of Assets and Liabilities and Cash Flow Statement. The board will also review the Auditor's Report and consider the declaration and payment of a 3rd interim dividend for FY 2025-26, with a record date of May 16, 2026. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results announcement.

  • Board meeting on May 12, 2026, to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Consideration of 3rd interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
  • Record date for interim dividend set as May 16, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gopal Snacks Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BINNY] Binny Ltd Approves Audited FY25 Results & Auditor Report
item.description:
Binny Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2025, along with the Independent Auditor's Report. The company also announced the convening of its adjourned 56th Annual General Meeting (AGM) on May 29, 2026, and set the book closure date from May 27-29, 2026. The auditor's report included a qualified opinion due to issues concerning an advance to RRB Energy Limited and a sale agreement with M/s Sanklecha Infra Projects Private Ltd, where recoverability and revenue recognition were questioned.

  • Audited financial results for FY25 approved.
  • Independent Auditor's Report issued with qualified opinion.
  • Adjourned 56th AGM scheduled for May 29, 2026.
  • Book closure dates set for May 27-29, 2026.
  • Concerns raised over advance recoverability and revenue recognition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BINNY LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SANCF] Sanchay Finvest Allots 48.5 Lakh Shares at ₹10 Preferentially
item.description:
Sanchay Finvest Ltd's Board of Directors met on April 20, 2026, to approve the preferential allotment of 48,50,000 equity shares at ₹10 each to non-promoters, raising ₹4.85 crore. The BSE had granted in-principle approval earlier. The company also noted the withdrawal of allotment for 12,50,000 shares to one allottee due to non-subscription. The funds raised will be utilized as per the object approved by members at an EGM. Directors were authorized to complete necessary filings.

  • Board approved preferential allotment of 48.5 lakh shares at ₹10 each.
  • Raised ₹4.85 crore from non-promoter allottees.
  • One allottee's offer of 12.5 lakh shares withdrawn due to non-subscription.
  • Funds to be utilized as per EGM approved objectives.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SANCHAY FINVEST LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SVAMSOF] Svam Software Appoints New Independent Director & CS
item.description:
Svam Software Ltd held a Board of Directors meeting on April 20, 2026. The board approved the appointment of Ms. Ritu Tiwari as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director and Ms. Anshu Gupta as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, both effective from the same date. Ms. Tiwari brings over a decade of experience in corporate governance and regulatory compliance, while Ms. Gupta is a qualified Company Secretary with expertise in corporate laws and secretarial practices. These appointments are intended to strengthen the company's governance and compliance framework.

  • Ms. Ritu Tiwari appointed as Additional Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Ms. Anshu Gupta appointed as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer.
  • Both appointments are effective from April 20, 2026.
  • Appointments aim to enhance corporate governance and compliance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SVAM SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [ROLEXRINGS] Rolex Rings Board to Consider Share Buyback on April 23, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Rolex Rings Limited has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 23, 2026, to consider a proposal for the buyback of its fully paid-up equity shares. This decision aligns with SEBI's Buy-Back of Securities Regulations, 2018. The company will inform the stock exchanges about the outcome post-meeting, adhering to LODR Regulations.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 23, 2026.
  • Proposal to consider equity share buyback.
  • Meeting to comply with SEBI Buy-Back Regulations.
  • Outcome to be disclosed post-meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rolex Rings Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NEOGEN] Cadamba Solutions Acquires 3.79% Stake in Neogen Chemicals
item.description:
Cadamba Solutions Private Limited, a promoter group member, has acquired 1,000,000 equity shares of Neogen Chemicals Limited through a preferential issue. The acquisition was made at an issue price of ₹1,610 per share, totaling ₹161 crore. This transaction represents 3.79% of the pre-allotment and 3.65% of the post-allotment paid-up equity capital. The acquisition was completed on April 18, 2026.

  • Promoter group entity acquired 10 lakh shares.
  • Acquisition via preferential issue at ₹1,610 per share.
  • Total investment amounts to ₹161 crore.
  • Stake acquired is 3.79% pre-allotment.
  • Transaction completed on April 18, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Shareholding
